title: festuca pumila subsp. varia
intro: Festuca pumila subsp. varia, also known as alpine fescue, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of festuca pumila subsp. varia include wound healing, skin protection, and antimicrobial activity. It can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used in some traditional skincare products due to its antioxidant and soothing properties.
